Amended Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Responses From & Impose Evidentiary Sanctions On Pltf Cpmc; And To Compel Further Discovery Responses From & Impose Monetary Sanctions On, Pltf Cpmc
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christine Van Aken for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's:
1) Motion to compel responses to request for production #21, 22, 23.
2) Motion for evidentiary sanctions.
3) Motion for further responses to request for production 15 and 16.

The Court has read and considered plaintiff's late-filed opposition. Defendant's motion for evidentiary sanctions is denied. Defendant's motion to compel further responses without objection to the request for production of documents is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection that comply with CCP Section 2031.210 et seq within 5 days of notice of this order. If plaintiff is unable to comply with a particular demand, the response shall comply with CCP Section 2031.230. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to comply with the previous order, asserted unmeritorious objections, and made evasive responses. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $480 are to be paid within 5 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Compel Discovery Responses From, And To Impose, Monetary Sanctions On, Pltf Californina Paicific Medical Center
Off Calendar Jul-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christine Van Aken Deputy City attorney for defendant and moving party City and County of San Francisco

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories (set #1), special interrogatories (set #1 and #2), and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $480 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
